game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Word Lookup Pro**: Word Lookup Pro functions as a comprehensive utility for word games, allowing players to input letter combinations to find valid words and anagrams from a 170,000+ word dictionary. Players use a virtual keyboard to type letters into a text input field, navigating between "Search" and "Anagrams" tabs to select their desired mode. In "Search" mode, typing letters, including '?' for single-letter wildcards and '-' for multi-letter wildcards, instantly displays matching words with their associated point scores. The "Anagrams" mode allows input of up to 11 letters, including 2 blank wildcards, to generate all possible valid words, with an option to group letters using parentheses. While lacking traditional progression, the app offers features like bookmarking words for definition review and pre-compiled "Useful Word Lists" to enhance vocabulary, with the Pro version specifically expanding anagram search capabilities.
game_info.description: Word Lookup Pro is a word puzzle game where you search through a massive dictionary to find valid words and create anagrams. Type letters to search for matching words, use wildcards (? for single letters, * for multiple) to find patterns, or switch to Anagram mode to discover all possible words from your letters. Each word has a point value based on letter scoring. Challenge yourself to find high-scoring words, discover rare combinations, and expand your vocabulary through various word lists and puzzle modes!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and word lists
Space: Toggle between Search and Anagram modes
A-Z Keys: Type letters into the search field
Shift: Toggle uppercase (visual only)
Z: Backspace/delete last letter
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic interaction test. Tests typing letters, switching modes, navigating results, and backspacing. Validates that the UI responds correctly to inputs and displays appropriate results.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Type a simple word pattern, check that results appear. Switch to anagram mode, enter letters, verify anagram generation. Navigate through results using arrow keys. Use backspace to clear letters.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully types letters, results are displayed, mode switching works, navigation through results is functional, and backspace clears the input correctly. No errors occur during interaction.

TEST_1.expected: The test successfully types letters, results are displayed, mode switching works, navigation through results is functional, and backspace clears the input correctly. No errors occur during interaction.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Tests the ability to discover high-value words and reach a target score that triggers the win condition. Validates scoring system and game completion.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically search for high-scoring words using strategic letter combinations. Focus on longer words and those with high-value letters (Q, Z, X, J). Search multiple patterns to accumulate points until reaching the win threshold.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test successfully finds multiple high-scoring words, accumulates enough points to trigger the win condition (500+ points), and the game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state with appropriate victory message.

TEST_3.test_description: Wildcard functionality test. Tests both single-character (?) and multi-character (*) wildcards in search mode. Validates that wildcard patterns return appropriate matching words.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Enter various wildcard patterns like "?AT", "C*T", "?O?E" to test single and multi-character wildcards. Verify that results match the pattern and wildcards work in different positions.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Wildcard searches return valid matching words. Single wildcards match exactly one letter, multi-wildcards match any number of letters. Results are correctly filtered and displayed.
TEST_3.description: Wildcard functionality test. Tests both single-character (?) and multi-character (*) wildcards in search mode. Validates that wildcard patterns return appropriate matching words.

TEST_3.expected: Wildcard searches return valid matching words. Single wildcards match exactly one letter, multi-wildcards match any number of letters. Results are correctly filtered and displayed.

TEST_4.test_description: Anagram generation test. Tests the ability to find all valid anagrams from a set of input letters, including handling of blank tiles as wildcards.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Enter common letter combinations in anagram mode (e.g., "CARE", "STONE"). Verify all valid anagrams are generated. Test with blank tiles to ensure they act as wildcards correctly.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: All valid anagrams are found and displayed. Blank tiles correctly substitute for any letter. Results are sorted appropriately and scoring is accurate.
